mapper.sql: select c.id, c.shitype, c.shitypename, c.lname, c.company, c.carmname, c.carmip, c.username, c.password, c.create_user, c.create_dept, c.create_time, c.update_user, c.update_time, c.status, c.is_deleted, c.type, c.server_url, c.server_url2, c.carmstar, c.px, c.dppx, c.srcimg, c.clist, c.rlist, c.now_quantity, c.all_quantity, c.ton, c.locationx, c.locationy, c.width, c.height, c.depth, c.safe_alert, c.channel, c.mine, c.tname, c.config, c.rad, unit.dept_name as tname_label, work.dept_name as mine_label, dict.dict_label as shitype_label from a_camera c left join sys_dept unit on unit.dept_id = c.tname left join sys_dept work on work.dept_id = c.mine left join sys_dict_data dict on dict.dict_type = 'shitype' and dict.dict_value = c.shitype
mapper.insert: insert into a_camera(id, shitype, shitypename, lname, company, carmname, carmip, username, password, create_user, create_dept, create_time, status, is_deleted, type, server_url, server_url2, carmstar, px, dppx, srcimg, clist, rlist, now_quantity, all_quantity, ton, locationx, locationy, width, height, depth, safe_alert, channel, mine, tname, config, rad) values(#{id}, #{shitype}, #{shitypename}, #{lname}, #{company}, #{carmname}, #{carmip}, #{username}, #{password}, #{createUser}, #{createDept}, sysdate(), #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{type}, #{serverUrl}, #{serverUrl2}, #{carmstar}, #{px}, #{dppx}, #{srcimg}, #{clist}, #{rlist}, #{nowQuantity}, #{allQuantity}, #{ton}, #{locationx}, #{locationy}, #{width}, #{height}, #{depth}, #{safeAlert}, #{channel}, #{mine}, #{tname}, #{config}, #{rad})
mapper.update:
update a_camera
shitype = #{shitype}, shitypename = #{shitypename}, lname = #{lname}, company = #{company}, carmname = #{carmname}, carmip = #{carmip}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, status = #{status}, type = #{type}, server_url = #{serverUrl}, server_url2 = #{serverUrl2}, carmstar = #{carmstar}, px = #{px}, dppx = #{dppx}, srcimg = #{srcimg}, clist = #{clist}, rlist = #{rlist}, now_quantity = #{nowQuantity}, all_quantity = #{allQuantity}, ton = #{ton}, locationx = #{locationx}, locationy = #{locationy}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, depth = #{depth}, safe_alert = #{safeAlert}, channel = #{channel}, mine = #{mine}, tname = #{tname}, config = #{config}, rad = #{rad}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'

update a_camera
now_quantity = #{nowQuantity}, ton = #{ton}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'

update a_camera set is_deleted = '1', update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select dict_value from sys_dict_data where dict_type = 'ks_density' and dict_label = #{dictLabel} and status = '0' limit 1
